conditioning.describeNote: describe the sheet's elements (characters, props, location) — feeds the 'Reference sheet:' half of the prompt
conditioning.note: ONE finished composite sheet (clean panels, black bg, no text); tiled to >=121 frames matching output length. Alternative: provide subject_images and the app builds the sheet.
up to 6 character/prop images — composed into a sheet (native-aspect top-row panels, black gutters, built oversized ~1456x825 then downscaled); per-image descriptions feed the dual-part prompt
optional full-width location band (~40% height) in the built sheet

Blemish (non-blocking, base-model quirk): quoted dialogue burned in as a small caption. SPLIT: floor 40.19 / peak 79.58 / act 39.39 GB, run 434s (IC seq = target+ref tokens, one full-res stage).
